statement.en: Lean 4 progress: Batch 6 Geometry Bundle — 13 theorems/lemmas, 0 sorry, 0 axiom
statement.ja: Lean 4 進捗: Batch 6 Geometry Bundle — 定理 13 / sorry 0 / axiom 0
statement.headerDoc:
STEP Batch 6 — Geometry unsolved problems
  ============================================

  Topics covered:
  1.  Kissing number (only n=1,2,3,4,8,24 known exactly)
  2.  Sphere packing (n=8 Viazovska 2016, n=24 Cohn-Kumar-Miller-Radchenko-Viazovska 2017)
  3.  Einstein problem (einstein tile, Smith-Myers-Kaplan-Goodman-Strauss 2023)
  4.  Moser's worm
  5.  Lebesgue's universal cover
  6.  Reinhardt's convex body packing minimum
  7.  Hadwiger-Nelson chromatic plane
  8.  Erdős–Szekeres happy ending
  9.  Perfect cuboid
  10. Sofa problem (Moser)
  11. Fejes Tóth convex body packing
  12. Mag

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
